## LibraryRuntime.RuntimeConfectionVersionBase.fillings property

Resolved filling slots for this version. Undefined if the version has no fillings.

**Signature:**

```typescript
get fillings(): ReadonlyArray<IResolvedFillingSlot> | undefined;
```
